name: Mini Breadboard (400 Tie-Points)

layout.center_gap: Between columns e and f (DIP IC groove)

left_terminal_strip.note: Each row of 5 holes (a-e) is electrically connected horizontally

right_terminal_strip.note: Each row of 4 holes (f-i) is electrically connected horizontally

power_rails.note: Power rails run vertically. Each rail is one continuous connection top-to-bottom. Left and right rails are NOT connected to each other — bridge them with a jumper wire.

description: Solderless breadboard with 30 rows. Center columns a-b-c-d-e and f-g-h-i separated by a DIP groove. Left and right sides each have two vertical power rails (+ and -). Power rails are NOT connected across sides — use jumper wires to bridge.
